completedItems: Implemented parent voice commands for teacher messages, feedback, child status, meals, health records, reminders, teacher replies, storybook share/export, and parent navigation.
Added confirmation previews for message, feedback, reminder read, storybook share, and storybook export.
Added E01 storybook service/API/client support for scoped list/get/upsert/export/share.
Rewired parent reminders to E01 reminder APIs so read state persists after refresh.
Added VoiceOrb download/copy result actions for storybook export/share.
Hardened child scope for parent commands, object ids, and child deeplinks.
Added parser and Playwright regression coverage with screenshots.
remainingItems: External storybook share/export service integration remains a future product decision.
Full feature:smoke has non-E09 legacy failures in D08/E03 paths.

checks.featureSmoke: failed: npm run feature:smoke failed in non-E09 full-suite paths (D08 communication/director-summary assertions, then E03 timeout and downstream ECONNREFUSED).

risks: Storybook share/export currently uses local fallback text/download content because no external service is configured.
Demo persistence survives refresh in the running Next.js process but is not durable across process restarts.
Full feature:smoke remains blocked by unrelated legacy D08/E03 failures.
notes: E09 parent voice skills reuse E06 command bus, E01 API/service/scope, and E05 provider status/fallback. No direct vivo calls or new vivo client were added.
